title: Resource Exhaustion – Uncontrolled Processing
description: The system is vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks due to a lack of rate limiting, insufficient resource allocation, or poorly designed algorithms.  This could overwhelm the system and make it unavailable to legitimate users.
affected_component: Application Server, Database Server, Network Infrastructure
attack_vector: Flooding the system with requests, exploiting resource-intensive operations, or triggering infinite loops.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Optimize resource allocation to prevent bottlenecks.
Employ caching mechanisms to reduce server load.
